_meta.provenance: Register of existing government systems referenced by the concept. Every entry is pending source verification (see verificationStatus). Integration relationships are Proposed KHELO BHARAT design — none are approved. No API should be assumed to exist merely because a portal exists.

systems.name: NSRS — National Sports Repository System
systems.owner: Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports (MYAS) / Sports Authority of India (SAI)
systems.purpose: National registry of athletes, coaches, academies and support personnel with unique IDs.
systems.relationshipNote: Proposed as the identity backbone — every KHELO BHARAT record attaches to an NSRS ID.

systems.name: PFMS — Public Financial Management System
systems.owner: Controller General of Accounts, Ministry of Finance
systems.purpose: Tracks central fund flows: sanction, release, utilisation; DBT payment rails.
systems.relationshipNote: Proposed mirror of sanction-to-utilisation status against scheme applications.

systems.name: eOffice
systems.purpose: Government electronic file movement and workflow.
systems.relationshipNote: Proposed read-only mirror of file status for scheme applications.

systems.name: KIRTI — Khelo India Rising Talent Identification
systems.purpose: Talent assessment programme for school-age children.
systems.relationshipNote: Assessment results proposed to land on the Athlete 360 timeline.

systems.name: DigiLocker
systems.purpose: Citizen document wallet with issued-document APIs.
systems.relationshipNote: Proposed for document submission and QR-verified certificate issuance.

systems.name: CPGRAMS — Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
systems.relationshipNote: Sports grievances proposed to interoperate rather than duplicate.

systems.name: NADA — National Anti-Doping Agency systems
systems.purpose: Anti-doping testing, results management, athlete whereabouts.
systems.relationshipNote: Doping flags proposed to follow NADA permissions strictly; no local copy.

systems.name: UDISE+ — Unified District Information System for Education
systems.purpose: School registry and education statistics; school codes.
systems.relationshipNote: School identity proposed to anchor screening-games capture.

systems.name: Fit India
systems.purpose: National fitness movement; school fitness assessments.
systems.relationshipNote: Screening games proposed to align with Fit India assessments to avoid duplicate testing.

systems.name: PM GatiShakti National Master Plan (GIS)
systems.purpose: National GIS platform for infrastructure planning.
systems.relationshipNote: Facility layer proposed on national GIS base.

systems.name: NPCI / RuPay
systems.relationshipNote: Proposed co-branded Khelo Bharat Sports Card with issuing banks.

systems.name: DBT — Direct Benefit Transfer
systems.purpose: Direct transfer of scheme benefits to beneficiaries.
systems.relationshipNote: Scholarships/stipends proposed to land on the Sports Card via DBT rails.

systems.name: NCrF — National Credit Framework
systems.purpose: Credit framework spanning school, higher and vocational education.
systems.relationshipNote: Sport achievement-to-credit ladder proposed to map to NCrF levels. Requires MoE policy decision.

systems.name: Aadhaar / APAAR
systems.purpose: Foundational identity; student lifetime academic ID (APAAR).
systems.relationshipNote: Identity de-duplication proposed via consented Aadhaar/APAAR linkage. Consent and DPDP review mandatory.

systems.name: MeitY-empanelled cloud hosting
systems.purpose: Empanelled cloud service providers for government workloads.
systems.relationshipNote: Hosting requirement, not a data integration.

systems.name: DPDP Act 2023 — Digital Personal Data Protection Act
systems.purpose: Personal data protection law: consent, purpose limitation, children's data.
systems.relationshipNote: Compliance obligation across every module; consent vault and guardian consent are design responses.

systems.name: National Sports Governance Act 2025 (National Sports Board, National Sports Tribunal)
systems.purpose: Governance framework for federations: recognition, elections, tribunals, athlete commissions.
systems.relationshipNote: M2 is proposed as the Act's digital compliance backbone. Statutory details require verification against the gazette text.

systems.name: Khelo India / TOPS / NCOE / STC programmes
systems.purpose: Flagship schemes: Khelo India games & scholarships, Target Olympic Podium Scheme, National Centres of Excellence, SAI Training Centres.
systems.relationshipNote: Scheme and centre data proposed to consolidate into registries and Athlete 360.
